title: MongoDB Evaluation Cases Braintrust Dataset
description: A Braintrust dataset as written to dataset/<name>.yaml by `scripts/datasets.sh pull`. The envelope wraps dataset metadata and the evaluation cases (rows).

dataset.description: Remote dataset metadata. Managed by Braintrust; do not hand-edit ids.

id.description: Braintrust dataset id (UUID). Assigned by Braintrust.

name.description: Dataset name. Must match the file name (without .yaml).

project_id.description: Braintrust project id (UUID) that owns this dataset.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to the dataset.

preview_length.description: Preview truncation length used by `bt datasets view`. -1 means full values.

row_limit.description: Row limit applied when the dataset was fetched (null = all rows).

rows.description: The evaluation cases in this dataset.

rows_previewed.description: True if row values were previewed/truncated rather than fully fetched.

rows_truncated.description: True if the number of returned rows was truncated.

id.description: Stable record id (UUID). Used by `bt datasets update` to upsert by id. Omit to let Braintrust assign one.

input.description: The case input handed to the evaluation task.

prompt.description: The user prompt sent to the LLM.

db_seed.description: Collections (from dbseed/) used to hydrate the database before the case runs.

expected.description: The expected result / grading criteria for this case.

judge.description: Natural-language rubric describing what a correct response/DB state looks like.

example.description: An example command or answer that would satisfy the judge.

scores.description: Names of scorer functions (see scorer/) to apply to this case.

origin.description: Braintrust provenance info linking back to a source object.

dbSeedEntry.description: Either a bare collection name, or a single-key object mapping a collection name to its setup (e.g. indexes).

oneOf.description: Name of a collection to seed (documents loaded from dbseed/<name>.json).
Collection name -> setup. Exactly one key (the collection name).

dbSeedSetup.description: Setup applied to a seeded collection.

indexes.description: Indexes to create on the collection before the case runs.

index.description: A MongoDB Atlas Search / Vector Search index definition.
